seoTitle: Ellen Grove vs Ellesmere — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ellen Grove and Ellesmere. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Ellen Grove vs Ellesmere: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ellen Grove and Ellesmere.
heading: Ellen Grove vs Ellesmere — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ellen Grove, Queensland and Ellesmere, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ellen Grove has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Ellesmere (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ellen Grove or Ellesmere safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ellen Grove has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Ellesmere scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ellen Grove scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Ellesmere scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ellen Grove or Ellesmere?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ellen Grove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
